title: agalinis flava var. macrantha
intro: Agalinis flava var. macrantha, also known as tall green dragon, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Orobanchaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can aid in wound healing and the reduction of fever. The health benefits of Agalinis flava var. macrantha include its ability to ease respiratory issues and promote cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used as teas or tinctures, and are often recommended for their potential to boost immune function and alleviate stress.
